title: TelemetryEnvelopeV2
description: V2 telemetry batch envelope sent to the ingest endpoint.

schemaVersion.description: Envelope schema version. Must be '2' for v2 payloads.

installId.description: Pseudonymous per-installation UUID. Never contains PII.

batchId.description: UUID that identifies this batch. Used as a dedup key at the Kinesis/ingest level.

events.description: One or more telemetry events included in this batch.

event_id.description: UUID uniquely identifying this event row. Used as the ClickHouse row-level dedup key.

event_name.description: Dot-namespaced event name, e.g. 'task.completed'. Must match a registered event in the registry.

occurred_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred on the client.

retention_class.description: Controls storage TTL and access policy. standard=90d, sensitive=30d with restricted access, ephemeral=7d.

dimensions_json.description: Escape valve for new dimensions before column promotion. All keys must be non-PII strings.

measurements_json.description: Numeric measurements escape valve, e.g. latency_ms, token_count.

agent_role.description: Promoted column (LowCardinality). The role of the agent that produced this event.

work_mode.description: Promoted column (LowCardinality). The work mode of the agent run, e.g. 'standard', 'plan'.

adapter_type.description: Promoted column (LowCardinality). The adapter type used, e.g. 'claude_local'.

model.description: Promoted column (LowCardinality). The model identifier used for LLM calls.

source.description: Promoted column (LowCardinality). Origin of the event, e.g. 'webhook', 'api', 'schedule'.
